CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COPY WORKS, INC. CRAVO, PAUL POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE DISPLAYMAKER LARGE FORMAT PRINTER, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $20,882.62 DAMAGES, $2,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $512.86 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,820.48, COST INCLUDES INTEREST OF $297.44 (SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH).
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-03-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
